content.full_text:
ISI IDEAL
SEMICONDUCTOR INC.

FACSIMILE COVER SHEET

TO: FPPC FROM: TERI PERSSON

ATTN: LOUISA Menchaca NO. OF PAGES: 1
CC: (Includes Cover Sheet)

FAX NO: 1-916-327-2026 DATE: 3/18/92


Louisa,

I was a defeated 1st time candidate in a general city council
election IN Fremont, IN November, 1991.
In March, 1992 2 council members were recalled from office.
As a candidate today to fill these 2 city council recalled seats,
CAN I use my campaign FUND from the 1st election in Nov.1991
on this election recall election to fill the recalled seats?

I have approximately $4500 remaining in our TERI PERSSON for
City Council acct # 910014 Thank you for an immediate
response in return writing

Our fax # is shown below.

IF YOU HAVE TROUBLE RECEIVING THIS FAX OR DID NOT RECEIVE ALL PAGES
ADVISED, PLEASE NOTIFY OUR FACSIMILE OFFICE AT 510-226-7000
IMMEDIATELY. THANK YOU.


46721 Fremont Blvd. • Fremont, California 94538 • Telephone (510) 226-7000 • Fax: (510) 226-1564

sections.question: As a candidate today to fill these 2 city council recalled seats, can I use my campaign fund from the 1st election in Nov. 1991 on this recall election to fill the recalled seats?
sections.question_synthetic: Whether a defeated city council candidate can use remaining campaign funds from a November 1991 general election to finance a subsequent March 1992 recall election campaign.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Incoming request faxed to FPPC by candidate; no FPPC response or conclusion present in document; question clearly stated in body of letter; approximately 1 page document

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: As a candidate today to fill these 2 city council recalled seats, can I use my campaign fund from the 1st election in Nov. 1991 on this recall election to fill the recalled seats?

OF PAGES: 1 (Includes Cover Sheet) DATE: 3/18/92 Louisa, I was a defeated 1st time candidate in a general city council election in Fremont, in November, 1991. In March, 1992 2 council members were recalled from office. As a candidate today to fill these 2 city council recalled seats, can I use my campaign fund from the 1st election in Nov. 1991 on this recall election to fill the recalled seats? I have approximately $4500 remaining in our Teri Persson for City Council acct #911014. Thank you for an immediate response in return writing. Our fax # is shown below. IF YOU HAVE TROUBLE RECEIVING THIS FAX OR DID NOT RECEIVE ALL PAGES ADVISED, PLEASE NOTIFY OUR FACSIMILE OFFICE AT 510-226-7000 IMMEDIATELY. THANK YOU.
embedding.summary: Teri Persson, a defeated first-time city council candidate from Fremont's November 1991 election, seeks FPPC guidance on whether she can use approximately $4,500 in remaining campaign funds from that election to finance her candidacy in a March 1992 recall election for two city council seats.
